pundit.name: Alexi Lalas
pundit.take:
Mustard Boy, Ghost Pepper, let me tell you something: drafting Bosnia, Devin? That's like betting on a one-legged horse in the derby. Czechia is going up against South Africa, and honestly, Mustard Boy, if you don't win this, you're proving that you've taken on more water than the Titanic. Look at me, Zach: you are barely hanging on to third place with 9 points, and if you let Devin's South Africa get the better of you, it will speak less about your soccer acumen and more about your susceptibility to utter humiliation. My crystal ball, forged in the fires of soccer insight, says Czechia will dismantle whatever hopes Devin has of making this a contest. Bold, confident, and inevitable: Czechia takes this matchup.

Now, as much as I would love to keep things spicy, Ghost Pepper, your choice in Bosnia, has been lukewarm at best. Against Switzerland, Devin's Bosnia might as well be bringing a slingshot to a gunfight. Bosnia couldn't outshine a flashlight under a spotlight, and if Switzerland does anything less than secure a victory, Mustard Boy, it might be time for you to hang up your drafting boots and take up fantasy knitting instead. The soccer gods, and this bald pundit, are whispering that Switzerland will reign supreme. Devin, Zach — bring some grit, some fight, or get ready to call it quits because this pool is not for the faint of heart.
